es.example_label: Find the refraction angle when light enters glass (n=1.5) from air at 45В°.
es.result_context: The refraction angle {theta2} degrees is the angle of the light ray in the second medium.
es.formula_display: nГўГўв‚¬ЕЎВЃ Г— sin(ОёГўГўв‚¬ЕЎВЃ) = nГўГўв‚¬ЕЎГўв‚¬ЕЎ Г— sin(ОёГўГўв‚¬ЕЎГўв‚¬ЕЎ)  ГўГўв‚¬В вЂ™  ОёГўГўв‚¬ЕЎГўв‚¬ЕЎ = arcsin((nГўГўв‚¬ЕЎВЃ Г— sin(ОёГўГўв‚¬ЕЎВЃ)) Г· nГўГўв‚¬ЕЎГўв‚¬ЕЎ)
steps: Apply Snell's law: sin(Оёв‚‚) = (1.0 Г— 0.7071) Г· 1.5 = 0.4714
mistakes: Using degrees in sine function without radian conversion
Not checking for total internal reflection condition
Swapping n1 and n2 in the formula
